# Open Magi

Open-source agents for real work, with hosted cloud when you want it.

## Canonical Links

- Website: https://openmagi.ai
- Source: https://github.com/openmagi/magi-agent
- Docs: https://openmagi.ai/docs
- Full agent docs: https://openmagi.ai/docs/llms-full.txt

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/openmagi/magi-agent.git
cd magi-agent
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Docs Index

- Open Magi Docs: https://openmagi.ai/docs - Open-source runtime first, managed cloud when you want hosted accounts, credits, storage, and operations.
- Getting Started: https://openmagi.ai/docs/getting-started - Clone the open-source runtime, install dependencies, run it locally, then decide whether to keep self-hosting or use Open Magi Cloud.
- Configuration: https://openmagi.ai/docs/configuration - Configure provider-neutral model routing, Knowledge Base, secrets, tools, channels, and hosted cloud behavior.
- Architecture: https://openmagi.ai/docs/architecture - Understand runtime state, execution contracts, memory, cloud hosting, and evidence gates.

## Core Concepts

- Open-source runtime with hosted Open Magi Cloud when managed infrastructure is preferred.
- Provider-neutral model routing across Claude, GPT, Gemini, local models, and OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
- Knowledge Base for durable workspace context and source-grounded work.
- Execution contracts and evidence gates for reliable completion.
